name: Food Delivery Price Intelligence API
description: Search restaurants, extract menu prices, and compare delivery offers across Uber Eats and DoorDash via x402 micropayments.
longDescription: Mobile-first food delivery intelligence for agents and data teams. Pull restaurant search results, menu pricing, and cross-platform comparison using carrier-grade proxy routing and pay-per-request settlement.

pricing.comparison: Bright Data and enterprise food-delivery datasets typically require monthly commitments and account setup. This service is pay-as-you-go ($0.01-$0.03) and directly callable by AI agents over x402 without subscription overhead.

whyMobileProxy: Uber Eats and DoorDash personalize storefront and availability by geo/device reputation. Datacenter traffic is throttled or challenged; mobile carrier IPs mimic real app traffic and improve data completeness for localized pricing, delivery windows, and promotions.
limitations: Platform markup changes may require parser updates
High-volume scraping should paginate and respect rate limits
Menu extraction is richest on Uber Eats flow
